notes:
v2.4.0 Update
📝 Card Quick Notes — write memos on any HUD card (all users)
💥 HP Change Popup — floating damage/healing numbers
👥 Scene Friendly NPCs — auto-display on HUD
🗂️ Actor Groups — save & swap roster selections
🖱️ Quick Roster Management — right-click add/remove
🐛 Fixed item uses (Ki Points, charges) not adjustable via HUD on DnD5e 4.x+

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.4.0
announcement.content:
v2.4.0 — Quick Notes, HP Popups, Actor Groups

  • 📝 Quick Notes: Write memos on any HUD card. GM notes are world-level, player notes are private.
  • 💥 HP Popup: Floating damage/healing numbers on HP change.
  • 👥 Scene NPCs: Friendly NPCs auto-appear on HUD.
  • 🗂️ Actor Groups: Save actor selections as groups, swap the entire roster at once.
  • 🖱️ Roster: Right-click actors or cards to add/remove from HUD.
  • 🐛 Fix: Item uses (Ki Points, charges) now adjustable on DnD5e 4.x+.
